title: Layout & Material Flow Optimization
challenge: Poor material flow and layout inefficiencies causing excess operator and material movement on the shopfloor, leading to high handling costs and delayed cycle times.
whatWeDid: Conducted spaghetti diagram studies to trace the physical path of operators and parts.
Performed detailed material flow analysis across all plant work stations.
Designed and implemented a streamlined lean layout configuration to establish one-directional flow cells.

results.movementReduction: 35% reduction in physical operator and material movement
results.spaceOptimised: 7,000 sq.ft of floor space optimized and freed for new production
results.financialImpact: Created ₹1.2 Cr in verified operational savings

title: Lead Time Reduction
challenge: Long lead times and slow customer response times tying up substantial working capital and risking key distributor relationships.
whatWeDid: Created end-to-end Value Stream Maps (VSM) to document processing vs. queue time.
Conducted a comprehensive inventory analysis at raw, WIP, and finished goods stages.
Identified process bottlenecks and optimized production scheduling around constraints.

results.leadTimeReduction: Order-to-dispatch lead time compressed from 3 days to 2.1 days (30% reduction)
results.bottleneckRemoval: Bottleneck removed at the critical production step
results.financialImpact: Unlocked ₹2.0 Cr in working capital and direct operational savings

title: OEE Improvement & SMED
challenge: Low overall equipment effectiveness and long changeover times capping total production output on critical high-demand packaging lines.
whatWeDid: Conducted OEE loss analysis to separate availability, performance, and quality constraints.
Deployed Total Productive Maintenance (TPM) standards at key workstation groups.
Applied SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) methodology to slash changeover times.
Established visual standards and procedures for rapid setup changes.

results.oeeImprovement: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) improved from 37% to 60% (+23% absolute gain)
results.changeoverReduction: Changeover time reduced from 12 hours to 7.4 hours
results.financialImpact: Generated ₹3.5 Cr in additional production value from existing equipment

title: Plate Mill Capacity Optimization
challenge: Severe capacity constraints in the Plate Mill limiting overall facility throughput, sales volume, and customer order fulfillment.
whatWeDid: Created detailed process maps of the entire rolling mill operations.
Conducted a Day-in-the-Life-of (DILO) study to track operator utilization.
Performed capacity and bottleneck studies across all equipment groups.
Identified the bottleneck at the Cut stage of the Plate Mill process flow.

results.throughputUplift: Identified and implemented a 32% throughput uplift in the Plate Mill
results.capexAvoidance: Zero capital expenditure; unlocked capacity entirely from existing machinery assets
results.financialImpact: Identified and created ₹18.0 Cr in additional annual throughput value

title: Workforce Optimization
challenge: High manpower requirements and low labor productivity inflating the cost-per-unit across drawing and annealing processes.
whatWeDid: Conducted Day-in-the-Life-of (DILO) studies for machine operators and handlers.
Ran time-and-motion studies to set standardized work elements.
Performed line balancing to distribute workload content evenly among team members.
Standardized work methods and material supply lines.

results.operatorOptimisation: Workforce optimized from 2,345 to 1,524 operators (821 operators optimized)
results.workforceReduction: 35% labor headcount reduction on production lines
results.financialImpact: Generated ₹18.72 Cr in verified annual direct labor cost savings
